column1: Darren had a new flat and he needed to buy a lot of new things. He had never had his own flat before, so he________his friend Mark to ask him what to do. (MEET)
"Well, if I__________you, I would start with the colour of the walls", said Mark. "What colour would you like them to be?" (BE)
Darren thought about it for a while. He realised he was no good at____________colours, so he asked Mark to help him. (CHOOSE)
They____________to a paint shop and started looking at all the different colours. (GO)
When he saw how much the paint cost, Darren was shocked. It was much__________than he had expected. (EXPENSIVE)
"Let's get the_____________one they have. I don't care what colour it is!" said Darren. (CHEAP)
Mark pointed to a very cheap paint that was a horrible brown colour. "I really_____________that's a good idea, Darren." (NOT THINK)
Without saying anything, Darren picked up the tin of brown paint, took it into the counter, and__________it. (BUY)
Mark couldn't believe it when Darren turned to__________and said: "I've learnt something today. Brown's my favourite colour!" (HE)
Alex Ferguson is famous for being the manager of a football team. Almost all football fans__________of him. (HEAR)
Alex Ferguson first____________over the role of Manager of Manchester United Football Club back in 1986. (TAKE)
At that time, few______________imagined that he would stay in the job for almost another three decades. (PERSON)
While Ferguson was Manager, Manchester United_________a total of 38 important trophies, including 13 Premier League titles. (WIN)
This made them one of the____________football teams in the world. (GOOD)
However, Ferguson_____________a good relationships with all the players all the time. Sometimes, they had terrible arguments and fights. (NOT HAVE)

In 2003, Ferguson and David Beckham had an argument about____________ . No-one knows exactly what it was, or what happened, but the story is that Beckham got hit in the face with a football boot! (THING)
In May 2013, Ferguson finally announced that he____________the club. This was during his 26th year as Manager. (LEAVE)
Manchester United supporters were very sad to hear the news from__________most successful manager ever. (THEY)
